title: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Pudding, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh, I see! My Apolo- Gies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yes sir... I hired them both!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So these two gentlemen are simply disasters who were taking the cafe down before it expired!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The two of you should know better!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're in the middle of deconstructing duties, you must first place a sign or notice stating as such notifying the public! I mean, there were even still customers in that cafe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Alright then, I'll be taking my leave!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, your due diligence is much appre- ciated!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm really sorry for the chaos caused, everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, so it wasn't a crime scene after all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh, before I forget... Congratu- lations...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: On your marriage, Lady pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ceremony is right around the corner so please get some rest and take a break from all your duties here at the cafe...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of us here truly wish you nothing but the best from the bottom of our hearts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Such kind words()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It appears Mr. Luffy has been saved!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wonder who that girl is... she's far too forgiving!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What fortuitous luck...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOHOHO, this too is part of our future pirate King's Talents!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Captain Pedro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's been far too long!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why are you he-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am here on vacation... If you would be so kind as to not alert others of my arrival, I'd be appreciative.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course sir, I'm honored to have even just met you once more!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You know people in this town?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll tell you about it later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: MAN...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: So your name is pudding, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks a bunch, you really bailed us out back there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh no, please don't mention it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I should be the one thanking you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Why's that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: W... well because you said my cafe was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: "Too delicious not to eat")

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: KyaAA®

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: th... the chocolate that place was made out of...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was made from a recipe I recently created from scratch!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How well did it melt in your mouth?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I added pure beet sugar and milk to cocobutter and then I kneaded the mixture together...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At 29 degrees celsius for 3 days and nights in a row!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I heard you exclaim how great it tasted, it made me want to cry tears of joy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sh... she's such a sweet and generous soul!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I guess you really like making chocolate!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What a coincidence! I love sweets :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This entire town smells like chocolate, it's what I imagined heaven would be like!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Ooh, the table's chocolate too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ufufu, glad to hear it :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don' mean to be rude pudding, we appreciate your hospitality and would love stay here longer...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we all have somewhere urgent to be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Is that so? AW... in that case...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How about just a cup of tea?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To wash down all of that excessive sweetness in your mouths!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where are my manners... I haven't even asked you all what your names are yet, have I?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm gonna be pirate Ki...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Remember someone

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 57 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
